Class LegoDsl.MotorBuilder

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl.LegoDsl.MotorBuilder
Enclosing class:
LegoDsl
public static final class LegoDsl.MotorBuilder extends Object
Fluent builder for Port Output motor commands.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull LegoDsl
    and()
    Returns the parent LegoDsl to continue chaining.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void>
    gotoAbsolutePosition(int position, int speed, int maxPower)
    Sends a GotoAbsolutePosition command (0x0D) on this port.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void>
    setAccTime(int timeMs)
    Sends a SetAccTime command (0x01).
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void>
    setDecTime(int timeMs)
    Sends a SetDecTime command (0x02).
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void>
    startSpeed(int speed)
    Sends a StartSpeed command with default max power (100).
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void>
    startSpeed(int speed, int maxPower)
    Sends a StartSpeed command (0x07) on this port.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void>
    startSpeedForDegrees(int degrees, int speed, int maxPower)
    Sends a StartSpeedForDegrees command (0x0B) on this port.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void>
    startSpeedForTime(int timeMs, int speed, int maxPower)
    Sends a StartSpeedForTime command (0x09) on this port.

  • Method Details

    • startSpeed

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> startSpeed(int speed, int maxPower)
      Sends a StartSpeed command (0x07) on this port.
      Parameters:
      speed - signed speed in the range −100 to 100
      maxPower - maximum power (0–100)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • startSpeed

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> startSpeed(int speed)
      Sends a StartSpeed command with default max power (100).
      Parameters:
      speed - signed speed in the range −100 to 100
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • startSpeedForTime

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> startSpeedForTime(int timeMs, int speed, int maxPower)
      Sends a StartSpeedForTime command (0x09) on this port.
      Parameters:
      timeMs - duration in milliseconds
      speed - signed speed in the range −100 to 100
      maxPower - maximum power (0–100)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • startSpeedForDegrees

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> startSpeedForDegrees(int degrees, int speed, int maxPower)
      Sends a StartSpeedForDegrees command (0x0B) on this port.
      Parameters:
      degrees - rotation in degrees (unsigned 32-bit)
      speed - signed speed in the range −100 to 100
      maxPower - maximum power (0–100)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • gotoAbsolutePosition

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> gotoAbsolutePosition(int position, int speed, int maxPower)
      Sends a GotoAbsolutePosition command (0x0D) on this port.
      Parameters:
      position - signed absolute position in degrees
      speed - signed speed in the range −100 to 100
      maxPower - maximum power (0–100)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • setAccTime

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> setAccTime(int timeMs)
      Sends a SetAccTime command (0x01).
      Parameters:
      timeMs - ramp-up time in milliseconds
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • setDecTime

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> setDecTime(int timeMs)
      Sends a SetDecTime command (0x02).
      Parameters:
      timeMs - ramp-down time in milliseconds
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • and

      public @NonNull LegoDsl and()
      Returns the parent LegoDsl to continue chaining.
      Returns:
      the parent builder; never null
